Notes: TCNJ overcame a 19-point deficit at halftime to earn its second NJAC win of
the year. Theresa DiMedio led the Lions with 16 points, while Kean's Chari'
Cooper posted game- and career-highs of 23 rebounds and 17 points.
Game.Officials: Mary McBreen,  Ed Nomejko,  Bob Polniak
